channel.title: engineering on Grayson Ricketts
channel.description: Recent content in engineering on Grayson Ricketts

item.title: Training for Craft
item.description: Athletes obsess about their training. Why is there less of a focus on how we train the intellect? Why is there less formalized training for advanced software engineering? The mindset around practice in software engineering is still in its infancy. Improvements in training techniques and training scheduling have increased sports performance. The performance of software engineers can improve by advancing the training. Intellectual training What does this training look like? Focused practice over time: dedicating X amount of time and mental energy towards improving Y over Z amount of time.
